commands.review_summary:
Regenerates Swift Gateway protocol models for optional session/chat agentId fields and updates focused CI, lint, and test expectations across protocol generation, gateway imports, OpenAI schema caching, codex-supervisor cleanup, agent session sentinels, and official plugin onboarding.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +6, Other +100. Total +108 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence runnable reproduction was performed in this read-only review. Source inspection shows the current schemas include optional agentId fields that the checked-in Swift generated output lacks, which is a credible protocol-check failure path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer-labeled PR with compatibility-sensitive generated protocol output; the remaining action is exact-head CI and maintainer review, not a safe repair job.

target.title: fix ci mainline checks
target.body:
## Summary

- Regenerate the Swift Gateway protocol model output for the new optional session/chat `agentId` fields, and keep those additive Swift initializer parameters source-compatible with `= nil` defaults.
- Keep the Swift protocol generator aware of newly added optional `agentId` fields so future generated output stays compatible for existing Swift call sites.
- Fix the remaining mainline lint/test expectation issues in `chat-abort`, OpenAI tool schema caching, codex-supervisor cleanup, the `global` session sentinel expectation, and official plugin onboarding coverage for Tokenjuice.

## CI failures addressed

After rebasing on `origin/main` (`522d0f7ef5`), several original failures had already been fixed on main: root shrinkwrap, codex-supervisor integer narrowing, and bash exec-host allowlist typing. This PR is still needed for the remaining unique fixes:

- `checks-fast-bundled-protocol`: regenerated `apps/shared/OpenClawKit/Sources/OpenClawProtocol/GatewayModels.swift` from the gateway protocol schema and made the new optional Swift initializer parameters default to `nil`.
- `check-additional-runtime-topology-architecture`: changed `src/gateway/chat-abort.ts` to import the narrow `OpenClawConfig` type from `types.openclaw` instead of the config runtime module.
- `checks-node-core-runtime-media-ui`: added Tokenjuice to the official optional plugin onboarding test expectation.
- `check-lint`: removed the redundant `unknown | undefined` return and the remaining codex-supervisor lint issues.
- `checks-node-agentic-commands-agent-channel`: updated the embedded agent command test to preserve `global` as the unscoped session sentinel; `isUnscopedSessionKeySentinel()` intentionally handles `global` before agent scoping.

## Verification

Rebased verification on `c360db493d3a1f91da422c984f5a94c3e2811d13`:

- `pnpm protocol:check` - passed.
- `node scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.mjs --check` - passed, root `npm-shrinkwrap.json` is current on rebased main.
- `pnpm format:check scripts/protocol-gen-swift.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.test.ts src/agents/openai-tool-schema.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts src/gateway/chat-abort.ts src/wizard/setup.official-plugins.test.ts` - passed.
- `node --import tsx scripts/check-import-cycles.ts` - passed, 0 runtime value cycles.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.test.ts src/agents/openai-tool-schema.ts` - passed.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/wizard/setup.official-plugins.test.ts src/commands/agent.test.ts extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.test.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/index.test.ts` - passed, 5 files / 139 tests.

Earlier pre-rebase proof also included the larger focused Vitest set, source test tsgo, extension prod tsgo, plugin boundary check, and autoreview. The broad extension test typecheck was previously blocked only by unrelated timer-cast errors in Mattermost/Xiaomi/Zai/Zalo tests; those are not in this rebased diff.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Remaining mainline CI failures from stale generated protocol output, import-cycle/lint issues, and stale test expectations.
Real environment tested: Local Codex worktree on macOS with repo wrappers and focused Vitest/protocol/shrinkwrap/lint checks after rebasing onto current `origin/main`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification above.
Evidence after fix: Focused tests and checks pass; protocol and shrinkwrap generators report current output.
Observed result after fix: The remaining reported failures are addressed in the touched lanes.
What was not tested: Full `pnpm check` / full CI locally.
target.author: romneyda
